scripts.dev: npm run build:packages && tsx watch apps/api/src/server.ts
scripts.worker:dev: npm run build:packages && tsx watch apps/worker/src/worker.ts
scripts.build:packages: tsc -p packages/contracts/tsconfig.json && tsc -p packages/permissions/tsconfig.json && tsc -p packages/config/tsconfig.json && tsc -p packages/testing/tsconfig.json && tsc -p packages/database/tsconfig.json
scripts.build: npm run build:packages && tsc -p apps/api/tsconfig.json && tsc -p apps/worker/tsconfig.json
scripts.typecheck: tsc -p packages/contracts/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p packages/permissions/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p packages/config/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p packages/testing/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p packages/database/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p apps/api/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p apps/worker/tsconfig.json --noEmit
